title: 6900 BBY

The following events took place in '''6900 [[Galactic Standard Calendar|BBY]]'''.

==Events==
*End of the [[Hundred-Year Darkness/Legends|Hundred-Year Darkness]] as remaining Dark Jedi are stripped of all weaponry and exiled to an uncharted region of space far outside the borders of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]].<ref name="Jedi vs. Sith: The Essential Guide to the Force" />
*[[Ajunta Pall]] and the [[Exiles|exiled Dark Jedi]] arrive on [[Korriban/Legends|Korriban]].<ref name="Jedi vs. Sith: The Essential Guide to the Force" />
*Formation of the [[Sith Empire/Legends|Old Sith Empire]] from the exiled Dark Jedi.<ref name="Jedi vs. Sith: The Essential Guide to the Force" />
*[[Quermia/Legends|Quermia]] joins the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]].
*A few of the [[Exiles|exiled Dark Jedi]] return to the Republic to [[First battle between Jedi and Sith|conquer]] the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]]. The Jedi learn that the Exiles had taken control of [[Sith Worlds/Legends|Sith Space]].<ref name="Jedi vs. Sith: The Essential Guide to the Force" />

==Battles==
*[[Battle of Corbos]]<ref name="Jedi vs. Sith: The Essential Guide to the Force" />
